text: I stand at the threshold between clinical order and creative chaos. The hallway is cold and echoing, the glass a barrier yet also a window into a colorful, vibrant space—one dedicated to research and development. The sight of fire safety equipment anchors me to reality, but the invitation of "R + D" draws my mind to curiosity. I feel a hesitant excitement, as though about to step from routine into the unknown potential of innovation and discovery.
